title: CaveStack Voice Profile
description: Defines how generateVoiceDirective() emits voice instructions for skills

description.description: Human-readable description of this voice profile

directive.description: Voice directive content by preamble tier

compact.description: Compact voice directive for tier 1 (browse, benchmark, setup)

full.description: Full voice directive for tiers 2-4 (most skills)

priority_instruction.description: Runtime injection line for caveman-voice-priority.js hook

verbose_phrases.description: Verbose-to-cave substitution pairs for voice-audit --fix mode

content_floors.description: Substance-level floors that flag claims requiring hedging or sourcing. Separate from density_thresholds (which count cosmetic tokens).

unverified_internet_claim.description: Flag prose that cites internet/web/WebSearch as authoritative without a hypothesis hedge.

trigger_patterns.description: Regex patterns that indicate an internet-sourced claim is being asserted.

required_hedges.description: At least one of these hedge tokens must appear near the trigger to pass.

max_violations.description: Number of unhedged internet claims allowed per document.
